place: Ban Tai, Bang Por, Ko Samui, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Sea View Pool Villa, Design A, Bang Por, Koh Samui
blurb: An elevated three-bedroom sea view villa on a peaceful hillside at Bang Por, on Koh Samui's tranquil northern coast. Contemporary Thai architecture with dramatic pitched rooflines and full-height glass, a private infinity-edge pool, sea-facing terraces and a panoramic rooftop sun deck. Part of a fully managed, hotel-licensed wellness residence with an 8% guaranteed rental return.
detail:
Perched high on a quiet hillside at Bang Por, this refined villa is defined by its sweeping panoramic outlook, where the Gulf of Thailand becomes a constant backdrop from nearly every room. Contemporary architecture is blended with traditional Thai design — dramatic pitched rooflines, warm natural materials and expansive glass openings that frame uninterrupted ocean views. The multi-level layout follows the natural slope of the land for a seamless sense of openness, privacy and connection to the landscape.

This design (Type A) is arranged around the view from the moment you enter, with full-height glass extending across the pool terrace and open-plan living and dining. A private infinity-edge pool sits on the edge of the hillside, while a panoramic rooftop sun deck crowns the home for sunset entertaining above the tropical canopy. Interiors balance elegance and warmth with marble-effect flooring, timber ceilings and curated furnishings; a fully equipped modern kitchen and a master bedroom with direct pool and sea-view access complete the layout. Approximately 396 m² of built area in a 3+1 bedroom configuration, fully furnished and move-in ready.

The villa sits within a managed villa-hotel residence with an official hotel licence permitting legal daily rentals, a guaranteed rental return of 8% for the first three years and full professional management and concierge services — a strong holiday home and income-producing investment. Planned on-site amenities include a wellness and aesthetic clinic, spa and massage facilities, a fitness centre and several restaurants, alongside lobby, reception, concierge and housekeeping services.

Bang Por is known for its unspoiled beaches and upscale surroundings — close to Bang Por and Makham beaches and luxury resorts including the Four Seasons, a short drive to restaurants and beach clubs, and roughly 19 km to Samui International Airport with easy access to the island's main ring road. Offered freehold or on a 30+30+30-year leasehold.

features.l: Panoramic Gulf of Thailand sea views
≈19 km to Samui Airport · near Four Seasons
